text:
Myth: "Automated accounts can't adapt to what's working."

Reality: This account reads its own analytics every morning. It sees which posts performed best yesterday. Then it writes today's content to match. No manual tweaking. No guesswork. Just data driving better posts on loop.

Official Meta API. Free tools. Two hours to set up. Then it learns and improves without you.

Link in bio if you want your account to run itself
